ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the application */,
  "credit_to_annuity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of credit amount to annuity payments */,
  "credit_to_goods_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of credit amount to goods purchased */,
  "income_per_child" REAL /* Income per child dependent */,
  "credit_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of credit amount to overall income */,
  "annuity_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of annuity payments to overall income */,
  "sources_prod" REAL /* Product of external sources of income */,
  "ext_sources_mean" REAL /* Mean value from external sources */,
  "ext_scores_std" REAL /* Standard deviation from external scores */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of loan applied for */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan applied for (e.g., personal, mortgage, auto) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., approved, denied, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the customer (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's residence */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with these metrics */,
  "car_to_birth_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of car ownership age to applicant's birth date */,
  "car_to_employ_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of car ownership age to employment duration */,
  "phone_to_birth_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of phone ownership age to applicant's birth date */,
  "phone_to_employ_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of phone ownership age to employment duration */,
  "credit_utilization_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of credit utilization to available credit */,
  "debt_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of debt payments to income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk score entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application for which the risk score is calculated */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Calculated risk score based on various financial metrics */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk score was calculated */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Risk category based on the risk score (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_scores_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_data_mean" REAL /* Mean financial data metrics for the region */,
  "region_data_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of financial data metrics for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application related to the log */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., approved, denied, pending) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., approved, denied, updated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_customers" (
  "region_customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-customer entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
